title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TransIndia Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TransIndia Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the TransIndia Logistics family as a Fleet Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TransIndia Logistics:
TransIndia Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TransIndia Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
